scenario.title: The Error Investigator
scenario.context: Your application is throwing an error in production. You have the error message, stack trace, and some logs. You need AI to help diagnose the root cause and suggest fixes.
scenario.goal: Write a prompt that provides AI with enough context to diagnose an error and suggest targeted fixes.
constraints: Include full error message and stack trace
Share recent changes that might be related
Describe what was expected vs what happened
scenario.exampleInput: TypeError: Cannot read property 'map' of undefined at PostsList.tsx:42. Started happening after deploying yesterday. Works in dev. User reports: blank screen on dashboard.
hints: Include the actual error and stack trace
Show the code around the error line

scoringGuide.excellent: Full error message, stack trace, and context
Error location code plus related files
